title: Flavor implementation map
description: The inverse Source-of-truth. For one flavor, this records WHERE each bit of the spec is realized in that flavor's real code: each entry pairs a spec node or plane with a code permalink and how it is validated. It is the spec-to-code counterpart of the // Source of truth: comment that points code-to-reference.

flavor.description: Flavor id this map belongs to; must match a spec/flavors/<id>.yaml.

specRef.description: Which bit of the spec this code realizes. area/stanza/flow/enum are referential-integrity checked; module/label are free-form for bits the corpus does not yet model as nodes.

module.description: A named codec/keying/transport module (free-form id, e.g. mlow/rangecoder).

label.description: Human label for the bit, when no node id fits.

url.description: GitHub permalink (pinned commit SHA + line range) into the flavor's source — the inverse of the code's // Source of truth: comment.

kat.description: Known-answer-test vector that proves this code, if any.

status.description: Implementation state of this bit in the flavor.
